find_city.title: Locate the Ancient City in the Deep Dark biome

swift_sneak.title: Obtain the Swift Sneak enchantment from Ancient City loot

subtitle.text: They built it. Then the sculk came. Then they came back. Wrong.

description: The Ancient City predates this world's current cycle.
What built it is unclear. What lives there now is the Warden.
The sculk is not the city. The sculk is what the city became.
The compass that finds where you last died was built from this material.
Whoever made the echo shard understood how memory can be stored in objects.
This connects to the Eye system in ways you will understand later.
Swift Sneak is the unique enchantment from Ancient City chests.
It allows silent movement while crouching — essential Warden navigation.
The Warden is not a fight. It is a consequence.
→ Collect 4 Echo Shards from city chests
